## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# guides

This folder contains per-surface normalization guides.

Each guide explains how raw extracted answer fields were interpreted and
which normalized columns should be used by scoring or analytics. These
documents are the first place to look when a CSV contains a `norm_*`
field, a normalized method class, or a task-specific extracted flag.

Included guides:

- `SCHEMA_A_NORMALIZATION_GUIDE.md`
- `SCHEMA_A_NEW_SYSTEM_NORMALIZATION_GUIDE.md`
- `SCHEMA_B_NORMALIZATION_GUIDE.md`
- `TEST01_NORMALIZATION_GUIDE.md`
- `TEST04_NORMALIZATION_GUIDE.md`

Not every benchmark surface needed a separate normalization guide. Tests
02, 03, 05, and 06 have simpler extracted fields whose scoring rules are
documented in `../../7.scoring/README.md` and the matching schema files.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
